digest.greeting: Jean, Friday closed several operational loops before the weekend, including the EPMO automation handoff ticket, the I-90 taskset follow-up, the 3:00 PM coverage conflict, and the EOW decision capture. A few reminders remain open, but the carry-forward list is tight and ready for Monday.

items.label: Closed the I-90 taskset follow-up for today
items.detail: The Legal confirmation item from today's checklist was marked complete, so the I-90 taskset path can move forward from the latest direction captured today.

items.label: Confirmed the EPMO automation Halo ticket was created
items.detail: Nicolas confirmed by email that Halo ticket 0031421 was created for the Toggl Admin and Connection Training workflow handoff review with IT.

items.label: Resolved coverage for the 3:00 PM planning overlap
items.detail: The overlap between IT Litify Sprint #14 Planning and the Executive Project Status slide update was marked complete for today's coverage decision.

items.label: Captured EOW project decisions before Monday
items.detail: Today's end-of-week project decision item was completed after the Friday EPMO and IT-heavy meeting block.

items.label: Finish the remaining Incident Response work with Bill
items.detail: Carry this into Monday if it did not close during Friday focus time or the EPMO blocks. Decide what still needs to be finished and who owns the next step.

items.label: Confirm the CoE newsletter owner and status
items.detail: The earlier CoE newsletter thread points to a Monday recap cadence. Confirm who owns the next send and whether anything is needed before Monday.

items.label: Follow up with Katie about the missing File Release project
items.detail: A new reminder was added today to follow up with Katie because the File Release project was not being found.

items.label: EPMO automation handoff now has an IT review ticket
items.detail: Nicolas created Halo ticket 0031421 so IT can review and support planning for the Toggl Admin and Connection Training workflows.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Monday starts with the recurring timecard and week-prep block.

items.label: Court EAD Final Updates scoping call overlaps Legal Change Management
items.detail: Court EAD Final Updates and Legal Change Management both run 10:00-10:30 AM. The Court EAD call has a concrete scoping agenda around eligibility review, scope, risks, resources, and requested timing.

items.label: One Pager - Amazon Connect Draft
items.detail: Thiago's meeting follows the thread where Jean suggested shaping Amazon Connect status into a clearer one-pager with on-track and at-risk visibility.

items.label: BD Portfolio Review, then 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Monday afternoon returns to portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Keep any Friday intake or ownership decisions ready to carry into that block.
